name: Orbit Notes
oneLineDescription: A lightweight team workspace for capturing meeting notes, decisions, and action items
whatItIs: Orbit Notes is a lightweight team workspace for capturing meeting notes, decisions, and action items. It helps small teams turn messy conversations into clear next steps. The primary use case is a team lead creates a note during or after a meeting, captures key decisions, assigns action items to teammates, and everyone can later search, filter, and track progress.

stack.name: @supabase/supabase-js
stack.purpose: Supabase client for database and auth

coreUserFlows: A team lead creates a note during or after a meeting, captures key decisions, assigns action items to teammates
Team members search, filter, and track progress on action items across projects
Team leads manage team membership by inviting new members and assigning roles
Users organize notes by projects and view activity timeline of recent team changes

dataModel.purpose: Stores team members with authentication and role information
Stores project containers for organizing notes
Stores meeting notes with rich text content and metadata
Stores tasks extracted from notes with assignment tracking

crossCuttingPrinciples: All data access is scoped to the user's team with no cross-team leakage
Three-tier authorization model with Viewer, Contributor, and Team Lead roles with increasing permissions
Single-team membership model where users belong to exactly one team
Team must always have at least one Team Lead for management continuity
Rich text support limited to headings, bold, italic, strikethrough, and lists only
specSummary: Orbit Notes is a team collaboration tool designed to transform meeting conversations into actionable outcomes through structured note-taking and task management. The application serves small teams who need to capture meeting discussions, document key decisions, and track follow-up actions in a centralized workspace. Built on Next.js 14 with Supabase backend, the platform implements a three-tier authorization system where Viewers have read-only access, Contributors can create and edit content, and Team Leads manage team membership and projects. The core workflow centers around project-based note organization, where team leads create rich-text notes during meetings, extract actionable items that can be assigned to teammates, and maintain visibility into progress through search capabilities and activity timelines. The system enforces strict team-scoped data isolation, ensuring users only access information within their organization. Key technical constraints include single-team membership, responsive web-only interface, and deliberate exclusion of real-time collaborative editing, file attachments, and notification systems to maintain simplicity. The application prioritizes fast note creation, comprehensive task tracking, and reliable search performance for teams managing up to 1,000 notes, positioning itself as a lightweight alternative to complex project management tools.
